proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_036` equal to 0 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036` equal to 2.

analyses.code: Group-wise mean contrast for pfs_months by feature_036 level.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_036` showed a strong ordinal separation: mean pfs_months was 4.327 for level 0, 3.185 for level 1, and 2.152 for level 2. The level 0 vs level 2 contrast was +2.175 months (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/Welch-equivalent contrast: pfs_months ~ feature_001.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_001=1` was associated with substantially lower PFS than `feature_001=0`, with a mean difference of -1.438 months (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_042` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/Welch-equivalent contrast: pfs_months ~ feature_042.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_042=1` had lower mean PFS than `feature_042=0`; the effect estimate was -0.921 months (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015` equal to adenocarcinoma have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015` equal to squamous.

analyses.code: Two-group contrast of pfs_months for feature_015 adenocarcinoma vs squamous.
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 3.670 months for `feature_015=adenocarcinoma` and 2.813 months for `feature_015=squamous`, a +0.857 month difference (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_057` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_057` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/Welch-equivalent contrast: pfs_months ~ feature_057.
analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted mean PFS was lower for `feature_057=1`; the mean difference was -0.810 months (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_010` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_010` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/Welch-equivalent contrast: pfs_months ~ feature_010.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_010=1` was associated with higher mean PFS than `feature_010=0`, with a +0.782 month difference (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_025` equal to never have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_025` equal to current.

analyses.code: Categorical group contrast for pfs_months by feature_025 level.
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 3.675 months for `feature_025=never`, 3.607 for `feature_025=former`, and 2.987 for `feature_025=current`. The never vs current contrast was +0.687 months (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher continuous `feature_056` values are associated with higher `pfs_months`, with a positive linear slope per 1-unit increase.

analyses.code: Univariate linear regression: pfs_months ~ feature_056.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_056` had a positive slope of +0.441 months per 1-unit increase in univariate regression (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_009` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_009` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/Welch-equivalent contrast: pfs_months ~ feature_009.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_009=1` had higher mean PFS than `feature_009=0`, with a +0.322 month difference (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_037` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_037` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/Welch-equivalent contrast: pfs_months ~ feature_037.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_037=1` was associated with lower PFS than `feature_037=0`, with a -0.204 month mean difference (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for the strongest main-effect features, patients with `feature_028` equal to 1 still have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_028` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Multivariable OLS with selected strongest main effects plus feature_028.
analyses.result_summary: The unadjusted `feature_028` deficit (-0.190 months) was not retained after adjustment; the adjusted coefficient was -0.009 months (p=0.243).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher continuous `feature_041` values are associated with higher `pfs_months`, with a positive linear slope per 1-unit increase.

analyses.code: Univariate linear regression and full main-effect adjusted OLS for pfs_months ~ feature_041.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_041` had a strong positive univariate slope of +0.170 months per unit and remained positive in the full adjusted main-effect model (+0.168 months per unit; p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher continuous `feature_004` values are associated with lower `pfs_months`, with a negative linear slope per 1-unit increase.

analyses.code: Univariate linear regression and full main-effect adjusted OLS for pfs_months ~ feature_004.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_004` had a negative slope of -0.073 months per unit in univariate analysis and -0.073 months per unit in the full adjusted main-effect model (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_066` equal to 1 have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_066` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/Welch-equivalent contrast: pfs_months ~ feature_066.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_066=1` had a modestly higher mean PFS than `feature_066=0`, with a +0.189 month difference (p=6.16e-11).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher continuous `feature_051` values are associated with lower `pfs_months`, with a negative linear slope per 1-unit increase.

analyses.code: Univariate linear regression and full main-effect adjusted OLS for pfs_months ~ feature_051.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_051` had a very small negative association with PFS: -0.0005 months per unit unadjusted (p=3.55e-5) and about -0.0004 months per unit after full main-effect adjustment (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_023` equal to 1 have meaningfully different mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_023` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group OLS/Welch-equivalent contrast: pfs_months ~ feature_023.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_023` showed no meaningful univariate association: the mean difference for `feature_023=1` vs 0 was +0.009 months (p=0.741).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_029` equal to 1 have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_029` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Two-group contrast and full main-effect adjusted OLS for feature_029.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_029=1` had lower PFS than `feature_029=0` in the unadjusted screen (-0.119 months; p=0.031) and remained lower after full main-effect adjustment (-0.110 months; p=7.59e-9).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_010` and `feature_009` have a positive interaction: the increase in `pfs_months` associated with `feature_010=1` is larger when `feature_009=1` than when `feature_009=0`.

analyses.code: Interaction regression: pfs_months ~ feature_010 + feature_009 + feature_010:feature_009.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_010` by `feature_009` interaction was strongly positive. Cell means were 3.213 (010=1,009=0), 5.766 (010=1,009=1), 3.334 (010=0,009=0), and 3.329 (010=0,009=1), giving a +2.558 month difference-in-differences (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_037` negatively modifies the association between `feature_010` and `pfs_months`: the `feature_010=1` benefit is smaller among patients with `feature_037=1` than among patients with `feature_037=0`.

analyses.code: Interaction regression: pfs_months ~ feature_037 + feature_010 + feature_037:feature_010.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_037` by `feature_010` interaction was negative. Mean PFS rose from 3.327 to 4.870 with `feature_010=1` when `feature_037=0`, but was 3.338 vs 3.186 when `feature_037=1`, yielding a -1.694 month interaction (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_057` negatively modifies the association between `feature_010` and `pfs_months`: the `feature_010=1` benefit is smaller among patients with `feature_057=1` than among patients with `feature_057=0`.

analyses.code: Interaction regression: pfs_months ~ feature_010 + feature_057 + feature_010:feature_057.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_010` was associated with much higher PFS when `feature_057=0` (4.190 vs 3.366 months) but not when `feature_057=1` (2.316 vs 2.702 months), producing a -1.210 month interaction (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_037` negatively modifies the association between `feature_009` and `pfs_months`: the `feature_009=1` benefit is smaller among patients with `feature_037=1` than among patients with `feature_037=0`.

analyses.code: Interaction regression: pfs_months ~ feature_037 + feature_009 + feature_037:feature_009.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_009=1` was associated with higher PFS when `feature_037=0` (3.892 vs 3.321 months), but not when `feature_037=1` (3.324 vs 3.316 months). The interaction estimate was -0.562 months (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_057` negatively modifies the association between `feature_009` and `pfs_months`: the `feature_009=1` benefit is smaller among patients with `feature_057=1` than among patients with `feature_057=0`.

analyses.code: Interaction regression: pfs_months ~ feature_057 + feature_009 + feature_057:feature_009.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_009=1` had a positive association among `feature_057=0` patients (3.696 vs 3.350 months), but was not positive among `feature_057=1` patients (2.568 vs 2.711 months). The interaction estimate was -0.488 months (p=4.12e-7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_001` negatively modifies the association between continuous `feature_041` and `pfs_months`: the positive `feature_041` slope is smaller when `feature_001=1` than when `feature_001=0`.

analyses.code: Interaction regression: pfs_months ~ feature_041 + feature_001 + feature_041:feature_001.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_041` slope was +0.1776 months/unit when `feature_001=0` and +0.1650 months/unit when `feature_001=1`; the slope difference was -0.0126 months/unit (p<1e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Continuous `feature_004` negatively modifies the association between continuous `feature_041` and `pfs_months`: the positive `feature_041` slope is weaker at higher `feature_004` values.

analyses.code: Centered interaction regression: pfs_months ~ centered(feature_041) + centered(feature_004) + centered(feature_041):centered(feature_004).
analyses.result_summary: The centered continuous interaction between `feature_041` and `feature_004` was negative, with an interaction coefficient of -0.00074 months per product-unit (p=8.30e-6).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After full main-effect adjustment for all available features, `feature_057=1` remains independently associated with lower `pfs_months` than `feature_057=0`.

analyses.code: Full main-effect OLS using all numeric features and categorical indicators, testing the feature_057 coefficient.
analyses.result_summary: The apparent unadjusted adverse association for `feature_057` was mostly attenuated in the full main-effect model: adjusted coefficient -0.028 months (p=0.0629), not significant at 0.05.
